rationale: Approve pantryProducts provisionally as the reusable food/product nutrition anchor, keep physical batches availability-only, and migrate existing recipe fields later as unverified unknown-provenance per-serving legacy data. Persistence must wait for the active Pantry schema package. The largest safe next Worker is a four-new-file privacy kernel: memory-hard local credential hashing, signed expiring versioned Nutrition sessions, optional-sensitive profile and goal validation, and deny-by-default owner/guardian/granular-viewer authorization. It materially advances server-enforced privacy without overlapping Pantry or dirty files.

worker_package.objective: Implement and test the real local Nutrition access/session boundary plus optional-sensitive Nutrition profile, goal-version, body-measurement, privacy and granular permission validation in four new files only.
verify: pnpm exec prettier --check src/lib/nutrition-access.ts src/lib/domain/nutrition-profile.ts tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
pnpm exec eslint src/lib/nutrition-access.ts src/lib/domain/nutrition-profile.ts tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
pnpm vitest run --project unit tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
git diff --check -- src/lib/nutrition-access.ts src/lib/domain/nutrition-profile.ts tests/unit/nutrition-access.test.ts tests/unit/nutrition-profile.test.ts
stop_if: Need to modify config, cookie routes, schema, migrations, Pantry or UI before the domain contract is verified.
Any design would treat ActorContext or a switchable profile as authorization.
Ambiguity would require inventing a medical/reference target or inferring a sensitive property.
A live provider call, credential read, external write or paid action would be required.
Verification fails twice for a cause not fixable within allowed_files.

evidence: Current git status and migration journal

parallel_safety.rationale: One Nutrition Worker owns only four new files; Pantry continues separate overlapping schema work.

missing_evidence: Implemented and verified Nutrition privacy/access kernel
Accepted Pantry foundation and migration review
Normalized Nutrition persistence and legacy backfill
Profiles/goals services and UI, recipe calculations, allocation/consumption, charts, integrations and full oracle
required_board_updates: Populate T007 exactly from worker_package and activate it.
After T007, re-check Pantry completion before any schema package.
Require a migration/historical-integrity Judge boundary and later a detailed-route privacy review.
